channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3739] conf-sanity.sh test_17 failed on SLES11 SP2 server
item.description:
[ 4630.367263] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == conf-sanity test 17: Verify failed mds_postsetup won't fail assertion (2936) (should return errs) == 21:04:28 (1376021068)
[ 4630.667176] LDISKFS-fs (sdb2): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: user_xattr,acl,errors=remount-ro,iopen_nopriv,user_xattr,acl,no_mbcache
[ 4631.436331] LNet: 10585:0:(debug.c:326:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) You are trying to use a numerical value for the mask - this will be deprecated in a future release.
[ 4631.436348] LNet: 10585:0:(debug.c:326:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) Skipped 5 previous similar messages
[ 4641.729705] Lustre: lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000: Connection to lustre-OST0000 (at 10.10.4.134@tcp) was lost; in progress operations using this service will wait for recovery to complete
[ 4641.729719] Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message
[ 4711.263486] LDISKFS-fs (sdb2): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: user_xattr,acl,errors=remount-ro,iopen_nopriv,user_xattr,acl,no_mbcache
[ 4711.559740] LustreError: 15c-8: MGC10.10.4.132@tcp: The configuration from log 'lustre-MDT0000' failed (-2). This may be the result of communication errors between this node and the MGS, a bad configuration, or other errors. See the syslog for more information.
[ 4711.559764] LustreError: 10673:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1260:server_start_targets()) failed to start server lustre-MDT0000: -2
[ 4711.622337] LustreError: 10673:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1735:server_fill_super()) Unable to start targets: -2
[ 4711.622450] LustreError: 10673:0:(obd_mount_server.c:851:lustre_disconnect_lwp()) lustre-MDT0000-lwp-MDT0000: Can't end config log lustre-client.
[ 4711.622462] LustreError: 10673:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1429:server_put_super()) lustre-MDT0000: failed to disconnect lwp. (rc=-2)
[ 4711.622572] LustreError: 10673:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1459:server_put_super()) no obd lustre-MDT0000
[ 4717.653069] ------------[ cut here ]------------
[ 4717.653085] WARNING: at /usr/src/packages/BUILD/kernel-default-3.0.80/linux-3.0/fs/proc/generic.c:809 remove_proc_entry+0x22d/0x280()
[ 4717.653092] Hardware name: H8DGT
[ 4717.653096] name 'quota_slave'
[ 4717.653099] Modules linked in: osp(N) lod(N) mdt(N) mgs(N) mgc(N) fsfilt_ldiskfs(N) osd_ldiskfs(N) lquota(N) mdd(N) lfsck(N) lustre(N) lov(N) osc(N) mdc(N) fid(N) fld(N) ksocklnd(N) ptlrpc(N) obdclass(N) lnet(N) lvfs(N) sha512_generic sha256_generic sha1_generic md5 crc32c libcfs(N) quota_v2 quota_tree ldiskfs(N) crc16 jbd2 autofs4 rdma_ucm ib_srp scsi_transport_srp scsi_tgt ib_sdp rdma_cm iw_cm ib_addr ib_ipoib ib_cm ib_sa ib_uverbs ib_umad iw_cxgb3 cxgb3 mdio mlx4_en mlx4_ib ib_mthca ib_mad ib_core cpufreq_conservative cpufreq_userspace cpufreq_powersave powernow_k8 mperf microcode loop dm_mod ipv6 ipv6_lib igb mlx4_core dca i2c_piix4 k10temp sg rtc_cmos pcspkr i2c_core serio_raw button usbhid hid ohci_hcd ehci_hcd usbcore usb_common sd_mod crc_t10dif scsi_dh_emc scsi_dh_rdac scsi_dh_alua scsi_dh_hp_sw scsi_dh ata_generic pata_atiixp edd ext3 mbcache jbd fan processor ahci libahci libata scsi_mod thermal thermal_sys hwmon [last unloaded: lnet_selftest]
[ 4717.653270] Supported: No, Unsupported modules are loaded
[ 4717.653277] Pid: 10673, comm: mount.lustre Tainted: G           N  3.0.80-0.7-default #1
[ 4717.653283] Call Trace:
[ 4717.653310]  [<ffffffff810048b5>] dump_trace+0x75/0x310
[ 4717.653327]  [<ffffffff81444163>] dump_stack+0x69/0x6f
[ 4717.653341]  [<ffffffff81059b2b>] warn_slowpath_common+0x7b/0xc0
[ 4717.653353]  [<ffffffff81059c25>] warn_slowpath_fmt+0x45/0x50
[ 4717.653365]  [<ffffffff811b37cd>] remove_proc_entry+0x22d/0x280
[ 4717.653479]  [<ffffffffa064820f>] lprocfs_remove_nolock+0x6f/0x100 [obdclass]
[ 4717.653636]  [<ffffffffa06483d8>] lprocfs_remove+0x18/0x30 [obdclass]
[ 4717.653719]  [<ffffffffa0c1774d>] qsd_fini+0x6d/0x440 [lquota]
[ 4717.653779]  [<ffffffffa0c6acb2>] osd_shutdown+0x32/0xe0 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 4717.653828]  [<ffffffffa0c750a9>] osd_device_fini+0x119/0x180 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 4717.653950]  [<ffffffffa0667311>] class_cleanup+0x641/0xda0 [obdclass]
[ 4717.654113]  [<ffffffffa0668c66>] class_process_config+0x11f6/0x1a50 [obdclass]
[ 4717.654275]  [<ffffffffa066962d>] class_manual_cleanup+0x16d/0x710 [obdclass]
[ 4717.654373]  [<ffffffffa0c72d58>] osd_obd_disconnect+0x168/0x1c0 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 4717.654490]  [<ffffffffa066ce05>] lustre_put_lsi+0x1b5/0x580 [obdclass]
[ 4717.654655]  [<ffffffffa06743c8>] lustre_common_put_super+0x168/0x270 [obdclass]
[ 4717.654824]  [<ffffffffa06a4357>] server_put_super+0x1b7/0xa30 [obdclass]
[ 4717.655048]  [<ffffffffa06a65b8>] server_fill_super+0x1f8/0xc40 [obdclass]
[ 4717.655273]  [<ffffffffa06734f8>] lustre_fill_super+0x178/0x530 [obdclass]
[ 4717.655349]  [<ffffffff811545c3>] mount_nodev+0x83/0xc0
[ 4717.655452]  [<ffffffffa066b2f0>] lustre_mount+0x20/0x30 [obdclass]
[ 4717.655523]  [<ffffffff8115413e>] mount_fs+0x4e/0x1a0
[ 4717.655537]  [<ffffffff8116f285>] vfs_kern_mount+0x65/0xd0
[ 4717.655549]  [<ffffffff8116f373>] do_kern_mount+0x53/0x110
[ 4717.655560]  [<ffffffff81170cbd>] do_mount+0x21d/0x260
[ 4717.655570]  [<ffffffff81170dc0>] sys_mount+0xc0/0xf0
[ 4717.655584]  [<ffffffff8144ee12>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
[ 4717.655605]  [<00007fa56b42a47a>] 0x7fa56b42a479
[ 4717.655610] ---[ end trace bb711ef32d2cd6c2 ]---
[ 4717.830241] Lustre: server umount lustre-MDT0000 complete
[ 4717.830253] Lustre: Skipped 4 previous similar messages
[ 4717.830277] LustreError: 10673:0:(obd_mount.c:1277:lustre_fill_super()) Unable to mount  (-2)
[ 4733.237808] LDISKFS-fs (sdb2): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: errors=remount-ro,iopen_nopriv,user_xattr,acl
[ 4734.754202] LDISKFS-fs (sdb2): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: errors=remount-ro,iopen_nopriv,user_xattr,acl
[ 4734.862947] LDISKFS-fs (sdb2): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: user_xattr,acl,errors=remount-ro,iopen_nopriv,user_xattr,acl,no_mbcache
[ 4735.065878] Lustre: Setting parameter lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.lov.stripesize in log lustre-MDT0000
item.environment:
server: lustre-master build #1604 SLES11 SP2
client: lustre-master build #1604 RHEL6
item.summary: conf-sanity.sh test_17 failed on SLES11 SP2 server

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: I do not see where the test is declaring a failure, though?
